title: Firefly to Fairy
description: Hey listen! This resource pack turns fireflies from the 1.21.5 Spring to Life update's firefly bushes into cute, familiar fairies!
body:
# Firefly to Fairy

<center>

A simple pack to make firefly bushes a little bit more magical!  

![Firefly to Fairy Banner](https://i.imgur.com/M1kXB8r.gif)

</center>



This pack tweaks firefly bushes themselves to look a bit more alive, gives the glowing bits a blue hue, and replaces the particles with 3 variants of friendly fairies inspired by Navi from The Legend of Zelda: Ocarina of Time.  

I made this while messing around working on my other resource pack [Modern Mizuno's](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/modern-mizunos), it pairs nicely, so be sure to check it out too!  

<center>

Check out the [**Slider Showcase!**](https://imgsli.com/MzY2Nzgx)

![Firefly to Fairy Slider](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/4JoSq0YY/images/a2b83c722c7210fff6404b13b91285e60bdf2b9b.png)

</center>
  
<center>
